channel.title: GitHub Lua Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Lua in GitHub

item.title: yetone/avante.nvim
item.description: Use your Neovim like using Cursor AI IDE!

item.title: mrcjkb/rustaceanvim
item.description: 🦀 Supercharge your Rust experience in Neovim! A heavily modified fork of rust-tools.nvim

item.title: koreader/koreader
item.description: An ebook reader application supporting PDF, DjVu, EPUB, FB2 and many more formats, running on Cervantes, Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook and Android devices

item.title: williamboman/mason-lspconfig.nvim
item.description: Extension to mason.nvim that makes it easier to use lspconfig with mason.nvim.

item.title: nvim-tree/nvim-web-devicons
item.description: Provides Nerd Font icons (glyphs) for use by neovim plugins

item.title: nvim-lua/plenary.nvim
item.description: plenary: full; complete; entire; absolute; unqualified. All the lua functions I don't want to write twice.

item.title: stevearc/dressing.nvim
item.description: Neovim plugin to improve the default vim.ui interfaces

item.title: mrjones2014/smart-splits.nvim
item.description: 🧠 Smart, seamless, directional navigation and resizing of Neovim + terminal multiplexer splits. Supports tmux, Wezterm, and Kitty. Think about splits in terms of "up/down/left/right".

item.title: nvim-tree/nvim-tree.lua
item.description: A file explorer tree for neovim written in lua

item.title: echasnovski/mini.nvim
item.description: Library of 40+ independent Lua modules improving overall Neovim (version 0.8 and higher) experience with minimal effort

item.title: DNLHC/glance.nvim
item.description: Peek preview window for LSP locations in Neovim

item.title: NeogitOrg/neogit
item.description: An interactive and powerful Git interface for Neovim, inspired by Magit

item.title: nvim-lua/kickstart.nvim
item.description: A launch point for your personal nvim configuration
